content.body:
- Add OnProgress callback to Config; Scan calls it after each file so callers can show live progress
- Add ByLanguage map[string]int to Result — populated from AST draft content["language"]
- Add CacheHits / CacheMisses counters to Result — tracked in Scan
- Add bootstrapSpinner (goroutine + ticker, stderr-only) for interactive TTY scans
- Wire spinner and OnProgress into runBootstrap, runMultiRepoBootstrap, runBootstrapInline
- Replace hardcoded "AST (Go)" label with "AST" + per-language indented breakdown
- Add cache summary line "✓ N cached · processing M new" after extractor breakdown
- Spinner and colors suppressed when stdout is not a TTY (isTerminalWriter)
- New tests: TestScan_ByLanguage, TestScan_CacheHitsMisses, TestScan_OnProgress

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat(cartographer): polish bootstrap UX with spinner, per-language AST, and cache stats (#80)
